title: MultiGridBarrier.jl: quasi-optimal solvers for convex variational problems
description: A Julia package for solving convex variational problems in function spaces (nonlinear PDEs and boundary-value problems), including nonsmooth ones such as the p-Laplacian, total variation, and obstacle problems, using the multigrid barrier method. Provides finite-element (1D/2D/3D, simplicial and tensor-product) and Chebyshev spectral discretizations, with optional CUDA GPU acceleration.
